description.value: Aura moderate illusion; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 39,300 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This twisted, dark gray staff allows use of the following spells: Disguise self (1 charge) Invisibility (1 charge) Nondetection (1 charge) Greater invisibility (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells disguise self, greater invisibility, invisibility, nondetection; Cost 20,900 gp.
